name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell
description: Execution / TA0002. Run a benign command through bash -c, capturing the shell-execution audit trail. The command is a stable test marker (`echo TTP-T1059-004-OK`) so the envelope's stdout_contains assertion is deterministic. The point is to exercise the shell-invocation code path under the audit envelope, not to demo a malicious shell action.
